name: Possible Credential Access Collection via Scanning Insecure Password Storage Files
description: Detects possible unauthorized remote access of insecure password storage files. Unauthorized access to password storage files can lead to compromised credentials, resulting in potential data breaches, unauthorized access to sensitive information, identity theft, and can be used by adversaries to create follow-up actions.

rules.name: Possible Malicious Access of Password Storage Files
[Heuristic Attribute] Data from Network Shared Drive

author: Mohammed Malubay
